# Alex Nass

> Bespoke tailoring atelier in Brussels. Custom suits for weddings, business and special occasions, by appointment only.

Alex Nass crafts made-to-measure suits, tuxedos, shirts and smart casual pieces using premium European fabrics. Personal consultations, precision measurements and multiple fittings are included with every commission.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Collections, process, pricing, FAQ and booking for the Alex Nass atelier.
- [Editorial](/editorial): Long-form editorial features on craft, fabrics and clients.
